## [USER STORY TITLE]

---

### User Story  
As a *<user>*, I want *<description of the user's need>*, so that *<what added value will be generated by obtaining what the user needs>*.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Description  
> *A clear and concise description of the User Story's context.*
________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Prototypes  
> *Wireframes or flowcharts that visually represent the described User Story. Once the high-fidelity Figma file is ready, include a link or screenshots.*
________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Acceptance Criteria
> *All requirements that demonstrate the product's functionality, presented in a numbered list format.*
1. Criterion 1.

2. Criterion 2.

3. Criterion 3.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Additional Context  
> *Any important observations to improve understanding of the User Story.*
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
